channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Australia Passes World-First Social Media Ban for Children Under 16
item.description: The Australian government has passed a law banning children under the age of 16 from using social media, sparking controversy and debate over online safety.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Future of Tech in LATAM: A Region on the Rise
item.description: LATAM's tech ecosystem is growing, driven by a surge in skilled professionals, sector diversity, and geographic diversity. The region's future looks promising, with government investments, cultural shifts, and strategic advantages.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Communication Networks Hit Hard by Valencia Storm
item.description: The recent storm in Valencia has left a trail of destruction, including significant damage to communication networks. Mobile operators MasOrange, Vodafone, and Telefónica were affected, with some experiencing outages of up to 30% of their fixed network and 22% of their mobile network.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
